summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Quote → Order → Invoice → PDF workflow for Konekt business OS. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly including Quotes v2, Invoices v2, Company Settings pages with PDF export functionality.

company_settings_api.get_settings: PASS - Returns default or saved company branding details
company_settings_api.update_settings: PASS - Saves company branding details with all fields

quotes_v2_api.create_quote: PASS - Creates quote with line items, generates QTN-YYYYMMDD-XXXXXX number
quotes_v2_api.list_quotes: PASS - Lists all quotes with pagination
quotes_v2_api.get_quote_by_id: PASS - Returns specific quote by ID
quotes_v2_api.update_quote_status: PASS - Updates quote status (draft → sent → approved)

quote_to_order_conversion.convert_quote_to_order: PASS - Creates order from quote, generates ORD-YYYYMMDD-XXXXXX number
quote_to_order_conversion.quote_status_updated: PASS - Quote status changes to 'converted' after conversion
quote_to_order_conversion.duplicate_conversion_rejected: PASS - Returns 400 for already converted quotes

quote_to_invoice_direct_conversion.convert_quote_to_invoice: PASS - Creates invoice directly from quote, generates INV-YYYYMMDD-XXXXXX number
quote_to_invoice_direct_conversion.quote_status_updated: PASS - Quote status changes to 'converted' after conversion

invoices_v2_api.create_invoice: PASS - Creates invoice with line items, generates INV-YYYYMMDD-XXXXXX number
invoices_v2_api.list_invoices: PASS - Lists all invoices with pagination
invoices_v2_api.get_invoice_by_id: PASS - Returns specific invoice by ID
invoices_v2_api.add_payment: PASS - Adds payment to invoice, updates amount_paid
invoices_v2_api.full_payment_auto_paid: PASS - Full payment automatically changes status to 'paid'

pdf_export.export_quote_pdf: PASS - Returns application/pdf content, file size > 0
pdf_export.export_invoice_pdf: PASS - Returns application/pdf content, file size > 0

full_e2e_workflow.complete_workflow: PASS - Quote → Approve → Order → Invoice → Payments → PAID status

frontend_quotes_page.create_quote_form: PASS - Form displays with customer fields and line items
frontend_quotes_page.quote_list: PASS - Shows quote cards with status badges
frontend_quotes_page.pdf_download_buttons: PASS - PDF download links correctly formatted
frontend_quotes_page.convert_to_order_buttons: PASS - To Order buttons present for non-converted quotes
frontend_quotes_page.convert_to_invoice_buttons: PASS - To Invoice buttons present for non-converted quotes
frontend_quotes_page.status_dropdown: PASS - Status can be changed via dropdown
frontend_quotes_page.stats_cards: PASS - Shows Total Quotes, Draft, Sent, Approved counts

frontend_invoices_page.create_invoice_form: PASS - Form displays with customer fields and line items
frontend_invoices_page.invoice_table: PASS - Shows invoice rows with all columns
frontend_invoices_page.add_payment_buttons: PASS - +Payment buttons present for all invoices
frontend_invoices_page.status_dropdown: PASS - Status can be changed via dropdown with color coding
frontend_invoices_page.stats_cards: PASS - Shows Total Invoices, Paid Revenue, Pending Amount, Overdue
frontend_invoices_page.from_order_button: PASS - From Order button present for converting orders to invoices

frontend_company_settings.company_info_section: PASS - Company Name, Logo URL, Email, Phone, Website, Tax Number, Address fields
frontend_company_settings.banking_section: PASS - Bank Name, Account Name, Account Number, Branch, SWIFT Code, Currency, Payment Instructions
frontend_company_settings.terms_section: PASS - Default Quote Terms and Invoice Terms textareas
frontend_company_settings.save_button: PASS - Save Settings button present and functional
frontend_company_settings.data_persistence: PASS - Settings loaded correctly from database

seed_data_creation: Test data created during testing (prefixed with TEST_): quotes, invoices, orders. E2E workflow created: TEST E2E Workflow customer with Quote → Order → Invoice → PAID status
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quote → Order → Invoice → PDF workflow is fully functional. All v2 routes work correctly. PDF export generates valid PDF files with company branding from settings. Company Settings page saves and loads branding details that appear on exported PDFs. Frontend pages correctly integrate with backend APIs.
features_verified: Quotes v2 - Full CRUD with line items
Quote to Order conversion with status update
Invoices v2 - Full CRUD with line items and payments
PDF Export - Quotes and Invoices as PDF with company branding
Frontend QuotesPageNew - Create form, list, PDF buttons, conversion buttons
Frontend InvoicesPage - Create form, table, PDF buttons, payment functionality
Frontend CompanySettingsPage - All branding fields, save functionality
